volumeTitle: The Merchant. The Braggart Soldier. The Ghost. The Persian
label: The Ghost (Section 3.1.583 - Section 3.1.641)

sections.label: Section 3.1.583
sections.original: Immo abi domum , verum hercle dico , abi modo .
sections.translation: Why no ; be off home . On my word , I ’ m telling the truth . Only do be off .

sections.label: Section 3.1.585
sections.original: Quin vos mihi faenus date . quid hic nugamini ?
sections.translation: Then do you pay me my interest . Why do you trifle with me this way ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.586
sections.original: Eu hércle , ne tu — abi modo , ausculta mihi .
sections.translation: Bravo ! faith . Really now , do be off ; do attend to me .

sections.label: Section 3.1.587
sections.translation: I ’ faith , I ’ ll call him now by name .

sections.label: Section 3.1.587b
sections.translation: Bravo ! stoutly done ! Really you are quite rich now when you bawl out .

sections.label: Section 3.1.588b
sections.translation: I ’ m asking for my own . In this way you ’ ve been disappointing me for these many days past .

sections.label: Section 3.1.590
sections.original: molestus si sum , reddite argentum : abiero .
sections.translation: If I ’ m troublesome , give me back the money ; I ’ ll go away then . That expression [*] puts an end to all replies .

sections.label: Section 3.1.592
sections.translation: Then , take the principal [*] .

sections.label: Section 3.1.592b
sections.translation: Why no , the interest ; I want that first .

sections.label: Section 3.1.593
sections.original: Quid ais tu , ómnium hominum taeterrime ?
sections.translation: What ? Have you , you fellow most foul of all fellows , come here to burst yourself ? Do what lies in your power .

sections.label: Section 3.1.595
sections.translation: He ’ s not going to pay you ; he doesn ’ t owe it .

sections.label: Section 3.1.595b
sections.translation: Not owe it ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.595c
sections.translation: Not a tittle , indeed , can you get from here . Would you prefer for him to go abroad , and leave the city in exile , driven hence for your sake ? Why then , in preference let him pay the [*] principal .

sections.label: Section 3.1.598b
sections.translation: But I don ’ t ask for it .

sections.label: Section 3.1.599_600
sections.original: sortem : illuc primum , faenus , reddundum est mihi .
sections.translation: Hark you ! you whip-knave , come back to me .

sections.label: Section 3.1.601
sections.original: Molestus ne sis . nemo dat , age quid lubet .
sections.translation: I ’ ll be there just now . ( To the BANKER .) Don ’ t you be troublesome : no one ’ s going to pay you ; do what you please . You are the only person , I suppose , that lends money upon interest .

sections.label: Section 3.1.603
sections.original: Cedo faenus , redde faenus , faenus reddite .
sections.translation: Give me my interest ! pay me my interest ! you pay my interest ! Are you going to give me my interest this instant ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.605
sections.translation: Give me my interest !

sections.label: Section 3.1.605b
sections.translation: Interest here , interest there ! The old rogue knows how to talk about nothing but interest . I do not think that ever I saw any beast more vile than you .

sections.label: Section 3.1.609
sections.original: Non edepol tu nunc me istis verbis territas .
sections.translation: Upon my faith , you don ’ t alarm me now with those expressions .

sections.label: Section 3.1.609a
sections.original: ⋯ calidum hoc est : etsi procul abest , urit male . ⋯
sections.translation: This is of a hot nature ; although it is at a distance off , it scorches badly [*] .

sections.label: Section 3.1.610
sections.original: quod illúc est faenus , opsecro , quod illíc petit ?
sections.translation: Pray , what interest is this that he is asking for ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.611
sections.original: Pater eccum advenit peregre non multo prius
sections.translation: Look now ; his father has arrived from abroad , not long since ; he ’ ll pay you both interest and principal ; don ’ t you then attempt any further to make us your enemies . See whether he puts you off .

sections.label: Section 3.1.614b
sections.translation: Nay but , I ’ ll take it , if anything ’ s offered .

sections.label: Section 3.1.615
sections.translation: What do you say , then —?

sections.label: Section 3.1.615b
sections.translation: What is it you mean ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.615c
sections.original: Quis illic est ? quid illíc petit ?
sections.translation: Who is this ? What is he asking for ? Why is he thus rudely speaking of my son Philolaches in this way , and giving you abuse to your face ? What ’ s owing him ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.618b
sections.translation: I beg of you , do order the money to be thrown in the face of this dirty brute .

sections.label: Section 3.1.620
sections.translation: I , order it ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.620b
sections.translation: Order the fellow ’ s face to be pelted with money .

sections.label: Section 3.1.621
sections.translation: I could very well put up with a pelting with money .

sections.label: Section 3.1.625
sections.translation: Don ’ t you hear him ? Troth now , prithee , doesn ’ t he seem just suited to be a Banker — a generation that ’ s most roguish ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.627
sections.original: Non ego istuc curo qui sit quid sit unde sit :
sections.translation: I don ’ t care , just now , for that , who he is or whence he is ;

sections.label: Section 3.1.628
sections.original: id volo mihi dici , id me scire éxpeto ,
sections.translation: this I want to be told me , this I very much wish to know —

sections.label: Section 3.1.622
sections.translation: What money ’ s this ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.622b
sections.translation: Philolaches owes this person a little .

sections.label: Section 3.1.623b
sections.translation: How much ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.623c
sections.translation: About forty minae .

sections.label: Section 3.1.624
sections.translation: Really , don ’ t think much of that ;

sections.label: Section 3.1.624b
sections.translation: it ’ s a trifle , in fact .

sections.label: Section 3.1.629
sections.original: adeo etiam argenti faenus creditum audio .
sections.translation: I heard from him that there was interest owing on the money as well .

sections.label: Section 3.1.630
sections.translation: Forty-four minae are due to him .

sections.label: Section 3.1.631
sections.translation: [*] Forty-four minae are due to him , both principal and interest .

sections.label: Section 3.1.631b
sections.translation: ’ Tis just that much ; I ask for nothing more .

sections.label: Section 3.1.632
sections.original: Velim quidem hercle ut uno nummo plus petas .
sections.translation: Upon my faith , I really could have wished that you had asked more , if only by a single coin .

sections.label: Section 3.1.633
sections.translation: Say that you ’ ll pay it , that he may be off .

sections.label: Section 3.1.633b
sections.translation: I , say that I ’ ll pay it ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.634
sections.translation: Do say so .

sections.label: Section 3.1.634b
sections.translation: What , I ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.634c
sections.original: Tu ipsus . dic modo , ausculta mihi .
sections.translation: You yourself . Do only say so . Do be guided by me . Do promise . Come now , I say ; I beg of you .

sections.label: Section 3.1.635b
sections.translation: Answer me ; what has been done with this money ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.636b
sections.translation: It ’ s safe .

sections.label: Section 3.1.636c
sections.translation: Pay it yourselves then , if it ’ s safe ,

sections.label: Section 3.1.637b
sections.translation: Your son has bought a house .

sections.label: Section 3.1.638b
sections.translation: A house ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.638c
sections.translation: A house .

sections.label: Section 3.1.638d
sections.translation: Bravo ! Philolaches is taking after his father ! The fellow now turns to merchandize .

sections.label: Section 3.1.640
sections.translation: A house , say you ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.640b
sections.original: Aedis inquam . sed scin quoius modi ?
sections.translation: A house , I tell you . But do you know of what sort ?

sections.label: Section 3.1.641
sections.translation: How can I know ?
